scope: Pass B full-surface expansion (verified against the Circa Postman-hosted API reference at docs.circa.co, real collection JSON fetched 2026-07-04): every documented resource is now either a covered read stream or a covered write action. Covered: 7 read streams (events, contacts, companies, teams, fields, event_contacts, event_staff, event_expenses, company_contacts) and 9 write actions covering contact/event/company create-update-delete plus event-contact add/update/remove lifecycle mutations. Excluded: single-object detail endpoints that duplicate an already-covered list stream's per-item record shape, and the async contacts-export job flow (initiate/poll/download has no declarative equivalent in this dialect).

excluded.reason: single-contact detail; identical record shape to the contacts list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-team detail; identical record shape to the teams list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-event detail; identical record shape to the events list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-event-contact detail; identical record shape to the event_contacts stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
polls an async export job's status/download URL; this dialect has no declarative create-then-poll-then-download primitive for asynchronous job resources

initiates an async event-contacts export job (returns 201 with a job id to poll); not a synchronous mutation this dialect's writes.json can express, and its output is a duplicate of the already-covered event_contacts read stream
deletes an async export job artifact; paired with the excluded create/show export endpoints above, not a standalone mutation of syncable object data
single-company detail; identical record shape to the companies list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-custom-field detail; identical record shape to the fields list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
